name: Celsius Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . When used in this Report, unless otherwise indicated, the terms the "Company, Celsius, we, us and our refer to Celsius Holdings, Inc. and its subsidiaries. Definitions of certain capitalized terms used in this Report are included within the Master Glossary. We were incorporated in the State of Nevada on April 26, 2005.
